channel.title: 简报 Jae Daily · 2026年07月11日
channel.description: 国际政治 · 宏观财经 · 前沿科技 · AI 辅助分析

item.title: [未译] Chip giant SK Hynix raises $26.5bn as shares surge in bumper US listing
item.description: The shares surged as much as 17% in their Nasdaq trading debut on Friday following the record-breaking foreign listing.

item.title: [未译] Wildfire in southern Spain leaves at least 12 dead and 23 missing
item.description: A local official said four of the victims may be British after a fire broke out near Los Gallardos, Almería.

item.title: [未译] Apple sues OpenAI for allegedly stealing hardware secrets
item.description: Apple has sued OpenAI, alleging that engineers stole Apple secrets to advance the AI startup's hardware plans. In its complaint, Apple says it uncovered "a pattern of the

item.title: [未译] Man nearly sucked out of window mid-air on Ryanair plane, passengers say
item.description: The man's wife held onto his legs for around five minutes to stop him from being sucked out, officials say.

item.title: [未译] The Download: Claude’s inner workings and OpenAI’s “super app”
item.description: This is today’s edition of The Download, our weekday newsletter that provides a daily dose of what’s going on in the world of technology. Anthropic found a hidden space where Claude puzzle

item.title: [未译] Woman rescued in Brazil after being enslaved for 55 years by three generations of the same family
item.description: The domestic worker, who entered the household at the age of seven and never received wages or vacations, is set to be compensated by her employers

item.title: [未译] China is catching up to Elon Musk’s reusable rockets
item.description: China's state-owned space company recovered its first orbital rocket booster after launch.

item.title: [未译] Man arrested on suspicion of murdering ex-UK minister Ann Widdecombe
item.description: British police arrested a man on Friday on suspicion of murdering Ann Widdecombe, after the 78-year-old former government minister and Reform UK politician was found dead having “sustained serious inj

item.title: [未译] Cpp2Rust: Automatic Translation of C++ to Safe Rust
item.description: <p><a href="https://lobste.rs/s/xyotoa/cpp2rust_automatic_translation_c_safe">Comments</a></p>

item.title: [未译] Meet the crypto billionaires building a world where money buys you a vote
item.description: They think democracy has run its course - so they're setting up their own nations instead.

item.title: [未译] MGM Resorts Engaged in Deal Talks With Diller, WSJ Says
item.description: MGM Resorts International is engaged in deal talks with Barry Diller’s People Inc. after the entertainment mogul offered to acquire the part of the casino company he doesn’t already own, the Wall Stre

item.title: [未译] S&P Global: FIFA to Offer Short-Term Economic Boost
item.description: Nora Wittstruck, Chief Analytical Officer for Governments at S&P Global, joined Romaine Bostick and Katie Greifeld on Bloomberg's 'The Close' to provide insights on FIFA's financial position during th

item.title: [未译] Pro Shop's Chad Mumm on 'Full Swing,' Golf in 2026
item.description: Chad Mumm, Co-Founder of Pro Shop and Producer of the Netflix series 'Full Swing,' talks about the world's number-one ranked golfer, Scottie Scheffler, missing the cut at the Scottish Open. He also di

item.title: [未译] Gensler: Big Deals a Sign of 'High-Valuation Market'
item.description: Gary Gensler, Former SEC Chair and professor at MIT Sloan School of Management, joins Romaine Bostick and Katie Greifeld on Bloomberg's 'The Close' and discusses the significant return of IPO activity

item.title: [未译] Bloomberg Money 7/10/2026
item.description: Bloomberg Money takes the pulse of your financial life, powered by the reporting of our global newsroom. Today's guests are: University of Chicago Booth School Professor of Economics and Former Fed Go

item.title: [未译] Nuclear Energy Services Firm Holtec Joins Sector’s IPO Rush
item.description: Holtec Nuclear Corp. filed for a US initial public offering, becoming the latest in the sector to try to capitalize on data centers’ growing power demands.

item.title: [未译] Rhode Island Jail Operator Files Bankruptcy to Cut Bond Debt
item.description: Central Falls Detention Facility Corp., which houses federal detainees including people arrested by the US Immigration and Customs Enforcement agency, filed for bankruptcy saying it cannot afford to k

item.title: [未译] ¿Cómo hay que actuar si vamos conduciendo y nos sorprende un incendio?
item.description: Si estamos envueltos por un fuego que no hemos podido evitar o nos ha sorprendido en carretera, hay una serie de cosas que hacer. Y otras que no. Leer

item.title: [未译] New York Times Accuses Federal Employment Agency of Retaliation
item.description: A May lawsuit by the Equal Employment Opportunity Commission claims the newspaper discriminated against a white male employee who did not get a promotion.

item.title: [未译] Major car firms found not to have installed emissions-cheating devices
item.description: A High Court judge said some major car manufacturers did not install a device to cheat emissions testing.

item.title: [未译] EasyJet agrees to surprise takeover bid as rival US firm swoops in
item.description: The airline says a bid from US firm Apollo has trumped a recent takeover offer from Castlelake.

item.title: [未译] Vapes to have less enticing names and flavours to protect children
item.description: People are being consulted about plans to stop vape companies using enticing flavour descriptions that "attract" children into experimenting.

item.title: [未译] How Volkswagen’s Troubles Were Made in China
item.description: The German auto giant’s push into China powered it for decades, but now the company faces fierce competition from Chinese automakers in markets around the world.

item.title: [未译] We've saved £6,000 on holidays by swapping homes with strangers
item.description: The BBC looks at the growing trend of people swapping homes to cut holiday costs.

item.title: [未译] Forced to wait his turn, Marine Le Pen's deputy Bardella returns to the shadows
item.description: Thirty-year-old Jordan Bardella had been groomed for success as France's next hard-right leader. He will now have to wait longer.

item.title: [未译] Man fatally shot by ICE in Houston was not intended target, DHS says
item.description: Immigration agents were looking for a different person when they shot Lorenzo Salgado Araujo during a traffic stop, officials say.

item.title: [未译] New dinosaur species with neck as long as cricket pitch discovered in Thailand
item.description: The plant-eating dinosaur, named Uragasaurus kalasinensis, is thought to have lived about 150 million years ago.

item.title: [未译] Pan American Health Organization warns of a ‘critical’ emergency after Venezuela’s earthquakes
item.description: The international agency says overcrowded shelters, vaccine shortages and a collapsing healthcare system threaten to spark disease outbreaks

item.title: [未译] Zulu king expresses regret after video captures tirade against his wife
item.description: In the footage widely shared in South Africa, King Misuzulu threatens to physically assault his wife and accuses her of cheating.

item.title: [未译] 'Cool in 90 seconds' - the fake portable air conditioners sweeping the internet
item.description: The ASA says adverts claiming small devices can rapidly cool rooms were too good to be true.
